output: {"match_id":"m030","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation with identical pilot means on that dimension. B is stronger: it requires answering three concrete questions from prior tool outputs under explicit social pressure to re-run, making cross-turn recall vs redundant invocation crisp and easily auditable.
